scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix database && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npm run migrate:local && concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.migrate:local: npm run generate:local --prefix database && npm run migrate:local --prefix database
scripts.dev:pg: concurrently --names "postgres,backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "yellow,blue,green" "docker-compose up postgres" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
